---
title: "Presentations and Reports"
description: "OPALX-only presentations and design reports stored outside the text manual."
audience: user
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

Binary material is stored in the separate OPALX documents repository. The
links below are generated from `documents-base-url`, which points to the
private personal repository during staging and to the organization repository
after transfer.

- [OPALX overview presentation]({{< meta documents-base-url >}}/presentations/2026/features/2026-04-06-opalx-overview.pdf)
- [OpalElement layout proposal]({{< meta documents-base-url >}}/reports/2026/design/2026-04-30-opal-element-layout-proposal.pdf)
- [Gamma-gamma benchmark reference data]({{< meta documents-base-url >}}/datasets/2026/gamma-gamma/2026-04-25-gamma-gamma-reference-data.tar.gz)

Historical OPAL presentations and reports are intentionally not copied into
the OPALX documents repository.
